title: Sunania virginiana
taxonomy: Sunania virginiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It belongs to the genus Sunania, which is a small group of plants native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The family Gentianaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as gentians or gentianworts. These plants are known for their showy flowers and are often used in traditional medicine. The classification of Sunania virginiana is further divided into various ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.
